sources.description: Enriched insurance claims data containing claim amounts and policy identifiers.
Raw customer master data including policy relationships and risk scores.
Raw transaction history containing customer transaction counts and amounts.

targets.description: Flagged high-risk insurance claims requiring fraud investigation and review.

joins.description: Links insurance claims to customer profiles and risk scores for fraud assessment.
Enriches customer data with transaction patterns to identify unusual claim behavior.

sql_blocks:
SELECT
        c.claim_id,
        c.policy_id,
        c.claim_amt_usd,
        cu.customer_id,
        cu.risk_score,
        t.transaction_count,
        t.total_transaction_amt
    FROM claims c
    JOIN customers cu
        ON c.policy_id = cu.policy_id
    LEFT JOIN transactions t
        ON cu.customer_id = t.customer_id
    WHERE c.claim_amt_usd > 10000
      AND cu.risk_score >= 70

transformations.description: Filters claims to those exceeding 10000 USD with customer risk scores of 70 or higher.
Creates fraud_flag column marking claims as HIGH_RISK when risk score is 90+ or transaction count exceeds 50, otherwise REVIEW.

business_summary: This fraud detection pipeline integrates claims, customer profiles, and transaction histories to identify potentially fraudulent insurance claims. It filters high-value claims from risky customers and assigns fraud flags based on risk score and transaction volume thresholds. The output table serves fraud investigation teams who review and take action on flagged claims.

needs_review.description: Links insurance claims to customer profiles and risk scores for fraud assessment.
Enriches customer data with transaction patterns to identify unusual claim behavior.
